questions.question: Where was Amber and Alan's first date?
questions.caption:
I was trying to find a place that was near her, and since she lived in River Park South, that left Earl's or Tim Hortons. Fortunately, I'm a man of class. - alan
Uhm, we also have Royal Pizza? - Amber

questions.question: Where was Amber and Alan's first trip together?
questions.caption:
We went to PEI too!! - amber
And spent 10 exhilarating minutes inside New Brunswick. - alan

questions.question: How long until one of them (OK, it was Alan) said, "I love you"?
Which music artist did Amber and Alan travel to see?
Who did Amber and Alan dress up as for their first Halloween together?
options: Animated characters: Kiki's Delivery Service's Kiki and Tombo
Video game characters: It Takes Two's Cody and May
Movie characters: Ferris Buehler's Day Off's Ferris and Sloane
Book characters: Lord of the Rings' Aragorn and Arwen
questions.correctAnswer: Video game characters: It Takes Two's Cody and May

questions.question: Where did the proposal happen?
On their second date, what did Alan bring for Murfy?
Which dating app did Amber and Alan trust to their fate?
Which creature has Amber brazenly declared as Alan's most identifiable spirit animal?
questions.caption:
Offensive. - alan
But you have the crest! - amber

questions.question: After enduring his endless complaints, what gift did Amber get for Alan for their first Christmas together?
questions.caption: Why would you need noise-cancelling headphones Alan??? -amber

questions.question: What is the name of Alan's extremely low-level beer league hockey team?
questions.caption:
And I'm the top scorer on this low-level team! Anyone care?? Anyone? - alan
No - amber

questions.question: What Dungeons and Dragons edition did Alan first play as a young nerdy teenager?
questions.caption:
This question was weirdly important for him to include. - amber
It's important, damnit. - alan

questions.question: How many times has Alan won his fantasy hockey league?
questions.caption: This answer is being submitted before I'm about to win fantasy hockey again this year, so it's a trick question, I guess. - alan

questions.question: Alan's favourite video game of all time is:
Alan's meager acting career landed him in some incredibly unmemorable movies and TV shows. Which one was NOT an actual production he appeared in:
options: Todd and the Book of Pure Evil
questions.caption: Me after getting my ass handed to me by "young Don Cherry" on CBC - alan

questions.question: Which actor did Alan get to work alongside for about ten minutes total:
questions.caption: Right before winning an Oscar, she appeared in a horrible little movie beside yours truly called "Bravetown" - alan

questions.question: Where was Alan's first job?
questions.caption: My blue collar roots started early. - alan

questions.question: When Alan was nearly removed from a Manitoba Moose hockey game for drunkenly heckling the opposing team, which country was he slandering for their lack of hockey talent and low GDP?
questions.caption: Technically I did not get kicked out! I was only warned three times with increasing exasperation. - alan

questions.question: What is Alan's go-to pizza order?
When the Winnipeg Jets were cast out of the NHL, which team did Alan move his allegiance to?
What is Amber's favourite Home Alone movie?
options: She's never seen any of them.
questions.caption:
Growing up, I don't remember watching Home Alone 1 or 2, so to me this was THE Home Alone. This is the best one - and Roger Ebert agrees with me! - amber
And now he's dead, sooo… - alan
You admitted you liked it - amber
Please stop - alan

questions.question: What is the highest Amber ever jumped on a horse?
questions.caption: While I was more into dressage, I did dabble in some horse jumping, my highest fence jumped being 4 feet! - amber

questions.question: What was the name of the horse Amber first leased?
questions.caption: I leased three horses during my years of horseback riding. First Alomar, then Bravo, then General. (Truffles was the first horse I took lessons on!) - amber

questions.question: Where was the main place Amber went camping as a kid?
questions.caption: Camping was a summer tradition for my family growing up. I would frequent the riding stables which is where my love of horses started.

questions.question: How many pets did Amber own in her lifetime? (Not including fish!)
questions.caption:
From mice, to snakes, to cats & dogs, I've had them all! (Special shout out to my mom for being a good sport and helping out) - amber
What is the answer if you INCLUDE fish??? - alan

questions.question: 90% of the music Amber plays in the car is basically from three artists. Which one is not in that group of three?
questions.caption:
Okay more like 95% (Sorry Alan). - amber
At least 2 of 3 of your choices are good. - alan

questions.question: For a school assignment, which of the following was NOT on 14-year-old Amber's: "Instructions on how to win my heart: For Dummies" list:
questions.caption:
Lucky for me to have ended up with the funniest man ever (he smells okay too) - amber
Currently employed too! But apparently that doesn't matter. - alan

questions.question: If Alan sees anything in THIS flavour, he knows to get it for Amber
Amber has had many jobs, which one of these did she not work as?
What was the highlight of Amber's New Zealand trip?
options: Galloping a horse down the beach
Black water rafting in the glow worm caves
Not having to tip at restaurants
questions.caption: This was a tough one! A close battle, but Hobbiton takes the win. - amber
